---
id: create-credentials
title: "Create credentials"
description: "Creates new credentials in a user context. Append `?workspaceId` to create the credentials in a workspace context. For AWS credentials with IAM role ARN, append `?useExternalId=true` to generate a Platform-managed External ID."
sidebar_label: "Create credentials"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create credentials"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/credentials"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates new credentials in a user context. Append `?workspaceId` to create the credentials in a workspace context. For AWS credentials with IAM role ARN, append `?useExternalId=true` to generate a Platform-managed External ID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
